title: Non-record: Sliding-Window Evaluation + Int8-Zlib Compression (1.34 bpb)
author: swetapaul08
body:
## Summary
This PR adds a non-record submission under `records/track_non_record_16mb/`.

Key idea:
- sliding-window style evaluation with EVAL_STRIDE=512
- int8 + zlib compressed artifact
- single GPU run

Included:
- README.md
- submission.json
- exp05_sliding.txt
- train_gpt.py

Final result:
- val_bpb: 1.34398504

This is a non-record submission and not intended for the main timed leaderboard.
submission_readme:
# Non-record submission: exp05_sliding

This is a non-record 16MB submission for the OpenAI Parameter Golf challenge.

## Summary
Main idea:
- sliding-window evaluation (EVAL_STRIDE=512)
- 1024 vocab tokenizer
- int8 + zlib compression

## Final result
- val_bpb: 1.34398504
- stopping step: 1765
- training time: 900 seconds
- compressed size: 14727167 bytes

## Setup
- model params: 17059912
- seq_len: 1024
- batch_tokens: 524288
- grad_accum_steps: 8

## Logs
See exp05_sliding.txt
